raw.message: Get a Welcome Bonus of 2M FREE Chips!

hook.summary: A man in a suit challenges the viewer to win big at poker.
hook.visual_action: A man in a maroon suit speaks directly to the camera against a blurred background.
hook.text_overlay: Build and crush your opponent's dreams
hook.voiceover_transcript: Build stacks and crush your opponent's dreams with

scene_flow: A man in a maroon suit challenges the viewer to "crush" their opponents.
Transition to a vibrant, neon-lit poker arena with the Zynga Poker logo.
Gameplay montage showcasing the new Multi-Table Tournament feature with player avatars.
The man returns, snapping his fingers to call the viewer to action.
Final shot of the man celebrating on a mountain of chips in a snowy landscape.
audience_proxy: Competitive men 25-50 who enjoy the prestige and high-stakes thrill of professional poker.
